Title: Enacts the "Sacred Burial Law" facilitating the handling of certain unclaimed bodies
Summary: Requires entities having possession of unclaimed bodies of deceased persons known to be of Jewish descent or to be of Muslim descent to contact certain organizations to inquire if such organizations are willing to assume responsibility for the burial or cremation of such persons.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public health law, in relation the handling of certain unclaimed bodies
